title: Blocky Enjoyment
description: This mod adds some building blocks, beaver and a few food items!
body:
Note! : This mod uses Mcreator to create this whole mod! - Blocky Enjoyment is a mod is simple and ment for a mod pack with some friend but I wanted to make it public. Please enjoy my mod and have fun with Minecraft as a whole. It adds food items, building blocks, beavers, and two weapons.

**![I HIGHLY RECOMEND YOU PLAY WITH JEI OR SOMETHING LIKE THAT, THIS IS A WARNING]!**


## **TEA**

When making tea keep in mind the fact one heated kettle can make upto 4 diffrent types of tea or 4 of the same flavor. When making tea you can make upto 9 diffrent flavors with a range of positive buffs.

## **ROLLS & COOKIES**

Each roll and cookie has diffrent varients that have simmlar stats but look and cost diffrent stuff more for cool looking food items.

## **BUILDING BLOCKS**

Most building blocks in this mod are good looking and fairly easy to obtain and building is easier for some builids. Neon blocks are single colored light blocks ment for cyber city like builds but are useful in may building regards. Supported block have 3 diffrent verients and have all wood types as a base. Each wood type have a uniqe texture.

### **ASH BLOCKS** 

Ash blocks are simple in concept and do one thing when exploded, they also explode, although this may seem pointless but when combining this with more ash blocks you can chain them togther and set off tnt far away. **Burning Ash Blocks** can be activated by redstone and when broken by a player it will damage them with some fire. And you can craft a waxxed form to stop chains.

## **BEAVERS**

Beavers are hostile when attacked but will kill any wolfs near by. Their tails can be used in tea and a weapon, I'll let you find out what that weapon is in the gallery. They spawn in rivers and can drop golden nuggets and sticks along with their tails. Their tail can be used in food items and tea.
